wheel.title: Start here
wheel.body: Tap a feeling to begin a check-in. There's no wrong answer.

journey.title: Your Journey
journey.body: Streaks, badges, and your weekly mood — all in one place.

patterns.title: Your Patterns
patterns.body: We notice when feelings tend to land — by day and time.

space.title: My Space
space.body: Your private journal and tools, kept just for you.

crisis.title: Need help now?
crisis.body: If things ever get heavy, this button is one tap away — anytime.

controls.title: Make it yours
controls.body: Change the language, switch themes, or use Listen mode here.

home.subtitle: Name what you feel, find what helps.
home.openWheel: Want to name a feeling? Open the emotion wheel

language.note: The app remembers your choice on this device.

intro.title: A gentle space to feel seen.
intro.description: Bhava helps you notice what you're feeling and try small things that might help. A few soft questions first — skip anything, take your time.

country.title: Where are you from originally?
country.description: Your home country — helps us tailor resources and language.

identity.title: I am...
identity.description: Select as many as feel true, or skip if you prefer.

options.firstGen: A first-generation immigrant in my family
options.mentalHealth: Living with a mental health condition

gender.title: How do you identify?
gender.description: This helps us use the right language with you. Select all that apply, or skip.

location.title: Where are you located now?
location.description: Your current region — so we can show the right crisis helplines if you ever need them.

situation.title: What is your current situation?
situation.description: Select all that feel true right now.

options.unemployed: I am between jobs or unemployed

goingOn.title: What has been going on for you lately?

options.adjusting: I am still adjusting to life in a new country
options.lonely: I have been feeling lonely or disconnected
options.visa: Visa, status, or paperwork is weighing on me
options.money: Money or costs are stressing me out
options.familyStigma: I cannot tell my family how bad it has gotten
options.process: Something happened and I need to process it
options.off: I have been feeling off and cannot explain why
options.notSure: I am not sure — I just needed somewhere to go

body.title: Take a moment and check in with yourself.
body.description: What are you feeling in your body? Select all that apply.

options.chestTightness: A tightness in my chest or throat
options.heaviness: A heaviness, like something is sitting on me
options.restlessness: Restlessness — I cannot seem to settle
options.inThoughts: It is more in my thoughts than my body
options.nothing: I do not notice anything right now

duration.title: How long has this been going on?

emergency.description: If you are experiencing a medical emergency, you can contact emergency services directly.

support.title: Everyone needs something different.
support.description: What sounds most helpful to you right now? Select all that feel right.
support.legend: What kind of support you need

options.figureOut: Help me figure out what I am feeling
options.doSomething: Give me something I can do right now to feel better
options.community: Connect me with people or communities near me
options.therapist: Help me find a therapist or counsellor
options.express: Just give me a space to express myself
